document.title: (CB)POE29U-1AT(PL)(R)-IEC 2062368 203RD-A1
document.documentType: CB / IEC test report component certification or specification document

sourceSummary.oneLine: Poor-OCR CB/IEC source text for a POE Injector component referencing IEC 62368-1 amendments, EN 50332-2 measurements, EU substance restrictions, and multiple electrical safety standards.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory or test-lab documentation for component safety and standards compliance review.
keyPoints: IEC 62368-1 clause 3.3.19 is replaced with following definitions.
Measurements shall be made in accordance with EN 50332-2 as applicable.
Directive 2011/65/EU is cited for restricted substances in electrical and electronic equipment within the EU.
The text lists multiple referenced standards for plugs, socket-outlets, appliance couplers, fire hazard testing, information technology equipment safety, enclosures, transformers, and power supplies.

entities.name: EU
entities.evidence: restricted within the EU: see Directive 2011/65/EU

entities.name: TC 108 Standards Interpretation Panel
entities.evidence: TC 108, Standards Interpretation Panel Question 15 — Output voltage

evidence.evidenceText: Replace 3.3.19 of IEC 62368-1 with the following definitions:

evidence.claim: Measurements are to be made in accordance with EN 50332-2 as applicable.
evidence.evidenceText: Measurements shall be made in accordance with EN 50332-2 as applicable.

evidence.claim: Directive 2011/65/EU is cited for restrictions on certain substances in electrical and electronic equipment within the EU.
evidence.evidenceText: NOTE Z1 The use of certain substances in electrical and electronic equipment is restricted within the EU: see Directive 2011/65/EU.
